cadence_days.description: Re-score the inference population every N days.

horizon_days.description: Prediction horizon in days. The model predicts whether the target event occurs within this window.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this autoresearch pipeline.

inference_population.description: Population scored daily. Typically broader than the training population.

iteration_budget.description: Total training iterations allowed for the autoresearch loop.

output_person_property.description: Person property name that stores the daily prediction score, e.g. 'predicted_p_pageview'.

plateau_iterations.description: Stop training if no AUC improvement is seen in this many consecutive iterations.

success_auc.description: Target AUC threshold. Training stops early if this score is reached.

target_definition.description: Full target definition including event filters and positive-label conditions.

target_event.description: PostHog event name to predict, e.g. '$pageview' or 'signed_up'.

training_lookback_days.description: How far back to look for training examples. Larger windows give more data but may include stale behavior.

training_population.description: Population used for training. Defines which users can appear as training examples.
